# vastai_instances (Data Source)

List all instances for the authenticated Vast.ai user. Returns instance details including hardware specs, status, and configuration for each instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all instances for the authenticated user
data "vastai_instances" "all" {}

output "instance_count" {
  value = length(data.vastai_instances.all.instances)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `label` (String) Filter instances by label (substring match). Only instances whose label contains this string will be returned.

### Read-Only

- `instances` (Attributes List) List of instances matching the filter criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instances))

<a id="nestedatt--instances"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instances`

Read-Only:

- `actual_status` (String) Current actual status of the instance (e.g., 'running', 'stopped', 'loading', 'exited').
- `cost_per_hour` (Number) Current cost per hour in USD.
- `cpu_cores` (Number) Number of effective CPU cores available.
- `cpu_ram_gb` (Number) System RAM in GB.
- `disk_space_gb` (Number) Allocated disk space in GB.
- `geolocation` (String) Geographic location of the machine hosting this instance.
- `gpu_name` (String) GPU model name (e.g., 'RTX 4090', 'A100 SXM4').
- `gpu_ram_gb` (Number) GPU memory per GPU in GB.
- `id` (String) Unique contract ID of the instance.
- `image` (String) Docker image running on this instance.
- `inet_down_mbps` (Number) Internet download speed in Mbps.
- `inet_up_mbps` (Number) Internet upload speed in Mbps.
- `intended_status` (String) Intended status of the instance ('running' or 'stopped').
- `is_bid` (Boolean) Whether this instance uses bid (interruptible) pricing.
- `label` (String) User-assigned label for this instance.
- `machine_id` (Number) Physical machine ID hosting this instance.
- `num_gpus` (Number) Number of GPUs allocated to this instance.
- `onstart` (String) Startup script command executed when the instance starts.
- `reliability` (Number) Host reliability score (0.0 to 1.0).
- `ssh_host` (String) SSH connection hostname for this instance.
- `ssh_port` (Number) SSH connection port for this instance.
- `status_msg` (String) Current status message providing detail about the instance state.
- `template_hash_id` (String) Hash ID of the template associated with this instance.
